name: AI Pharmacovigilance Agent (Telegram + AI ADR Detection, Native PDF)

parameters.text: Thanks for reaching out. Please describe the suspected adverse drug reaction in a text message (drug name, symptoms, and when they started) so I can log it correctly for our drug safety team.

=You are a pharmacovigilance assistant reviewing a spontaneous adverse event report submitted via Telegram.

Reporter message:
"""{{ $json.reportText }}"""

Analyze the message and return ONLY a valid JSON object (no markdown, no commentary, no code fences) with exactly these fields:
{
  "drugName": string (suspected drug/product name, or "unspecified" if not mentioned),
  "adverseReaction": string (short plain-language description of the reaction/symptoms),
  "meddraPreferredTerm": string (your best-guess MedDRA-style preferred term for the reaction),
  "severity": one of "Mild", "Moderate", "Serious", "Life-threatening",
  "isAdverseEventDetected": boolean (false if the message does not actually describe a drug-related adverse event),
  "confidence": number between 0 and 1,
  "clinicalRationale": string (1-2 sentences explaining the severity classification),
  "recommendedAction": string (next step, e.g. "Routine follow-up", "Escalate to safety physician within 24h", "Immediate medical review required")
}

nodes.name: Log ADR Report to Google Sheets
Send Urgent Alert to Safety Team
Send Routine Notification to Safety Team

parameters.text: =Thank you for your report. It has been logged (ID: {{ $('Parse & Validate AI Output').item.json.reportId }}) and classified as "{{ $('Parse & Validate AI Output').item.json.severity }}" severity. Our drug safety team will review it{{ $('Parse & Validate AI Output').item.json.severity === 'Serious' || $('Parse & Validate AI Output').item.json.severity === 'Life-threatening' ? ' urgently' : '' }}. This does not replace medical care — if you are experiencing a medical emergency, please contact emergency services immediately.
